from source import mergesort
import pytest

def test_single_element_list():
    """Test that mergesort handles a single-element list without infinite recursion."""
    # On buggy code (base case len(arr)==0), this will cause RecursionError.
    # On fixed code (base case len(arr)<=1), it returns [1].
    result = mergesort([1])
    assert result == [1], f"Expected [1], but got {result}"
